notes: MMDVM HS Hat open-source digital mode modem BOM. Comma-delimited; component references in the Refs column are semicolon-separated (e.g., 'C24;C25;C26') rather than space-separated. SPR holds the supplier name (Mouser), SPN the Mouser part number. Real Murata, Vishay, AVX, Omron Electronics, Analog Devices MPNs.
